description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Make a one-time credit card donation between $70 and $80 to the active featured campaign that focuses on emergency veterinary care for injured or ill animals, making sure you do not opt into the email newsletter.

tasks.instruction: From the wishlist, add three different items in the Food & Treats category priced between $10 and $20 to your donation cart, with the quantity set to one for each.

tasks.instruction: Make a one-time tribute donation between $45 and $55 given in honor of a person, choose a birthday-themed e-card design, schedule it for a send date in December 2026, and pay by credit card.

expected_values.message: Thinking of you and supporting the animals in your honor!

tasks.instruction: Find an adult cat (2–8 years) described as shy and preferring a quiet home, then submit a foster interest form offering to foster them for three months starting on the first of next month.

tasks.instruction: Compare the suggested donation options for the dog-kennel construction campaign and the medical-emergencies campaign, then make a one-time credit card gift at the smallest suggested amount to whichever has the lower minimum suggested level.

tasks.instruction: Add wishlist items from at least two different categories, then adjust your cart so it contains exactly three different products and five total units, apply promo code FEED10, and proceed to checkout.
